mapper.sql: dynamicId, publishId, content, publishImgUrl, topicId, socialGroupId, readCount, dzCount, plCount, publishDate
mapper.insert: insert into dynamic (dynamicId, publishId, content, publishImgUrl, topicId, socialGroupId, readCount, publishDate) values (#{dynamicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{publishId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{publishImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{topicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{socialGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{readCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{publishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into dynamic
dynamicId,
publishId,
content,
publishImgUrl,
topicId,
socialGroupId,
readCount,
publishDate,
#{dynamicId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{publishId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{publishImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{topicId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{socialGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{readCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{publishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update dynamic
publishId = #{publishId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
publishImgUrl = #{publishImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
topicId = #{topicId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
socialGroupId = #{socialGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
readCount = #{readCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dzCount = #{dzCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
plCount = #{plCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
publishDate = #{publishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where dynamicId = #{dynamicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dynamic set publishId = #{publishId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publishImgUrl = #{publishImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, topicId = #{topicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, socialGroupId = #{socialGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, readCount = #{readCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, publishDate = #{publishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where dynamicId = #{dynamicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select dy.dynamicId, dy.publishId, ui.nickname, ui.headImgUrl, dy.content, dy.publishImgUrl, dy.socialGroupId, case when dy.socialGroupId is null then 0 when dy.socialGroupId=0 then 0 else 1 end as moreFlag, sg.groupName, dy.readCount, dy.dzCount, dy.plCount, (select count(1) from dz_record dr where dr.dynamicId=dy.dynamicId and dr.dzUserId=#{userId}) as dzStatus, (select ua.attentionStatus from user_attention ua where ua.attentedId = dy.publishId and ua.observerId = #{userId}) as attentionStatus, date_format(dy.publishDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as publishDate from dynamic dy left join user_info ui on ui.userId = dy.publishId left join store_group sg on sg.storeGroupId = dy.socialGroupId WHERE dy.dynamicId NOT IN (SELECT ds.dynamicId FROM dynamic_shield ds WHERE ds.userId=#{userId}) order by dy.publishDate desc LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

select count(*) from dynamic dy left join user_info ui on ui.userId = dy.publishId left join store_group sg on sg.storeGroupId = dy.socialGroupId WHERE dy.dynamicId NOT IN (SELECT ds.dynamicId FROM dynamic_shield ds WHERE ds.userId=#{userId})

select dy.publishId, ui.nickname, ui.headImgUrl, ui.sex, dy.content, dy.publishImgUrl, dy.socialGroupId, sg.groupName, (select ua.attentionStatus from user_attention ua where ua.attentedId = dy.publishId and ua.observerId = #{userId}) as attentionStatus, dy.readCount, dy.dzCount, dy.plCount, (select count(1) from dz_record dr where dr.dynamicId=dy.dynamicId and dr.dzUserId=#{userId}) as dzStatus, date_format(dy.publishDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as publishDate from dynamic dy left join user_info ui on ui.userId = dy.publishId left join store_group sg on sg.storeGroupId = dy.socialGroupId where dy.dynamicId = #{dynamicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: update dynamic set plCount = plCount+1, readCount = readCount + 1 where dynamicId = #{dynamicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update dynamic set dzCount = dzCount + #{dzCount}, readCount = readCount + 1 where dynamicId = #{dynamicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dynamic set readCount = readCount + 1 where dynamicId in
#{dynamicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select dy.dynamicId, dy.publishId, ui.nickname, ui.headImgUrl, dy.content, dy.publishImgUrl, dy.socialGroupId, case when dy.socialGroupId is null then 0 when dy.socialGroupId=0 then 0 else 1 end as moreFlag, sg.groupName, dy.readCount, dy.dzCount, dy.plCount, (select count(1) from dz_record dr where dr.dynamicId=dy.dynamicId and dr.dzUserId=#{myId}) as dzStatus, date_format(dy.publishDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as publishDate from dynamic dy left join user_info ui on ui.userId = dy.publishId left join store_group sg on sg.storeGroupId = dy.socialGroupId where dy.publishId = #{userId} order by dy.publishDate desc LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from dynamic dy left join user_info ui on ui.userId = dy.publishId left join store_group sg on sg.storeGroupId = dy.socialGroupId where dy.publishId = #{userId}
SELECT u.userId, u.nickname, u.headImgUrl FROM dz_record d INNER JOIN user_info u ON u.userId=d.dzUserId WHERE d.dynamicId=#{dynamicId} ORDER BY d.dzRecordId desc limit 0, 9

select ui.userId, ui.nickname, ui.headImgUrl, ui.sex, case when ua.attentionStatus = 1 then 1 else 0 END as attentionStatus from dz_record dz inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = dz.dzUserId left join user_attention ua on ua.attentedId = dz.dzUserId and ua.observerId = #{userId} where dz.dynamicId=#{dynamicId} ORDER BY dz.dzRecordId desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select COUNT(*) from dz_record dz inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = dz.dzUserId where dz.dynamicId=#{dynamicId}
